intro: We are an independent e-commerce store for skincare and cosmetics products within Egypt. We don't manufacture products — we act as a distributor that selects its goods from trusted suppliers and wholesalers, with careful attention to verifying authenticity, packaging condition, and expiry dates before shipping. Our goal is to make buying skincare a simple, transparent, and hype-free experience.
philosophy: Our philosophy rests on three pillars: transparency in information, reliability in execution, and respect for the customer's time and budget. Your trust is not earned by a slogan — it's built through a consistent experience with every single order.

visionMission.visionText: To be Egypt's most trusted destination where skincare and beauty become easy, joyful, and real — with every product, every time.
visionMission.missionText: We strive to provide authentic, high-quality skincare and cosmetics products through a trusted, technology-driven platform. We make beauty accessible with confidence through transparency, responsible supplier selection, and dependable service — to build long-term relationships and sustainable profitability grounded in integrity, simplicity, and respect.

serviceCommitments.heading: Service Commitments
serviceCommitments.disclaimer: * All timeframes are estimates and depend on the courier, weather conditions, and external logistical factors.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.text: Delivery to most governorates via shipping partners. Typically 1–3 business days within Greater Cairo, and 2–5 business days for other governorates (may vary by courier and location).

payment.title: Payment Options
payment.text: Cash on delivery, or by card/available wallets depending on the courier. All transactions are processed through certified payment channels.

returns.title: Return Policy
returns.text: Returns accepted within 14 days for unopened products and in accordance with the conditions stated on the returns page. Our goal is fair and transparent return processing.

response.title: Response
response.text: We aim to respond during official working hours. When inquiries are high volume, we prioritize post-purchase and delivery requests.

items.a: We purchase from trusted suppliers and wholesalers within Egypt and retain purchase proofs. We inspect packaging and expiry dates before shipping.
You can pay cash on delivery, or by card/available wallets depending on the courier.
Typically 1–3 business days within Greater Cairo, and 2–5 business days for other governorates. The timeframe is an estimate and depends on the courier.
Returns within 14 days for unopened products and in accordance with the stated conditions on the returns page. For assistance, contact us before returning.

contact.heading: We're Here to Help
contact.body: For inquiries or post-purchase feedback, we're happy to hear from you. We aim to respond during working hours.
